{{CargoRelic
|name=The Son of Man
|class_id=21138
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Surreal icon: bowler-hatted man obscured by apple, hidden eye peeking. Modern art’s most dissected philosophical riddle.
|fame=48
|art=107
|fth=72
|civ=71
|tech=64
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>All minion skins ATK +10%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail HP +60<br>Minion Skins crafted: 90/90
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>All minion skins ATK +20%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail HP +80<br>Minion Skins crafted: 90/90
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>All minion skins ATK +30%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail HP +100<br>Minion Skins crafted: 90/90
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>All minion skins ATK +50%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail HP +140<br>Minion Skins crafted: 90/90
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>All minion skins ATK +70%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail HP +180<br>Minion Skins crafted: 90/90
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>All minion skins ATK +100%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail HP +240<br>Minion Skins crafted: 90/90
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>All minion skins ATK +100%<br>Per 3 Minion Skins crafted, Snail HP +240<br>Minion Skins crafted: 90/90<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rockyhighland skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Rocky Highland:Rocky Highland, Fine Stone output speed+30%
|skill2=[[File:Rockyhighland skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Rocky Highland:Rocky Highland, Zone SUP effect reduced by 30%
|skill3=[[File:Rockyhighland skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Rocky Highland:Rocky Highland, Relic ART +15
}}
